message:
v0.3.15: Add Claude session cache pattern and improve deletion diagnostics

Three changes:

1. New artifact pattern — claude-session-cache:
   - Matches directories with prefix "claude-" (e.g., /tmp/claude-<uid>/)
   - Claude Code session caches can grow to 100+ GB in /tmp, making them
     significant disk pressure sources on agent swarm machines
   - Classified as CacheDir with confidence 0.88
   - extract_pattern_label() maps to "claude-*" for consistent reporting

2. Deletion executor stderr diagnostics:
   - Add eprintln! for skip events (non-PathGone, non-ContainsGit) with
     path and skip reason, providing real-time visibility into why
     candidates are being skipped without needing to parse structured logs
   - Add eprintln! for deletion failures with path and error message
   - These supplement (not replace) the existing structured ActivityEvent
     logging

3. Version bump 0.3.14 → 0.3.15

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "storage_ballast_helper"
-version = "0.3.14"
+version = "0.3.15"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "System service that prevents disk-full scenarios from coding agent swarms via ballast files, artifact scanning, and special location monitoring."
